command: const fs = require('node:fs'); const [node, template, item, runDir] = process.argv.slice(1); fs.mkdirSync(runDir, { recursive: true }); fs.appendFileSync(`${runDir}/workflow.log`, `${new Date().toISOString()} node=${node} template=${template} item=${item || '-'}\n`); console.log(`ran ${node}`);

discover.description: Run a discovery step and write an entry to the run log.

plan.description: Run a planning step before creating dynamic branches.

fanout_items.description: Create dynamic branches. Example: workflow_fanout(group='items', template='process_item', items=['alpha','beta'], join='join_items').

process_item.description: Template node for dynamically generated branches such as process_item:alpha.

join_items.description: Dynamic join. This node becomes available after all process_item:<item> branches complete.
